title: Conquest: MCA Reborn
description: Conquest Reforged mod compatibility resource pack for MCA Reborn.
body:
[![Project Logo](https://i.imgur.com/iBiOO1X.png)](https://modrinth.com/collection/rTrmBCww) Resource pack support for [Minecraft Comes Alive Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn) to match the style of the [Conquest Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/conquest-reforged) mod.


### Huge thanks and credit to Monsterfish for allowing me to use some textures from [Conquest_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/conquest_)
